globalNews.title: How US commerce secretary's Epstein links were uncovered by British whistleblower
globalNews.summary: Simon Andriesz made the discovery about Howard Lutnick in publicly released Epstein files.

globalNews.title: Israeli strike on police post in north Gaza kills seven, officials say
globalNews.summary: A senior officer in the Hamas-run police force was among those killed in the strike, which Israel's military says targeted "terrorists".

globalNews.title: Diamond giant De Beers halts work at flagship South African mine as demand plummets
globalNews.summary: Production will stop for two years at the mine which employs more than 4,000 people.

globalNews.title: 'If we die, we die together': Wife of man nearly sucked out of Ryanair plane speaks of ordeal
globalNews.summary: Svetlana Grković told Serbian media that her husband is "seriously injured and in shock".

globalNews.title: Bangkok fire investigation finds locked doors and flammable decor as deaths climb to 30
globalNews.summary: Survivors and first responders reported locked doors and a lack of signage marking emergency exits.

cryptoNews.title: OpenAI quietly adds Kalshi World Cup odds to ChatGPT: Report
cryptoNews.summary: OpenAI’s ChatGPT now displays Kalshi’s World Cup prediction market odds in search results, marking the AI firm’s first reported deal with a prediction market platform.

cryptoNews.title: Strategy became a symbol of the dot-com crash: Could history repeat?
cryptoNews.summary: MicroStrategy blew up during the dot-com era, before Michael Saylor transformed it into the world's largest corporate Bitcoin holder. Did he learn his lesson?

cryptoNews.title: Humanity Protocol to prioritize operational security following $36M hack
cryptoNews.summary: Humanity Protocol’s founder said they will refocus on operational security, as malicious actors are switching from smart contract vulnerabilities to exploiting human behavior.

cryptoNews.title: ABA, state banking groups push back on CLARITY Act stablecoin yield provisions
cryptoNews.summary: ABA and state banking associations published a joint letter calling for more detail on the CLARITY Act’s stablecoin yield provisions, ahead of the bill’s House hearing on Friday.

cryptoNews.title: Solana community lead enters UK by-election with onchain transparency pitch
cryptoNews.summary: Superteam UK lead Stephen “Cap” Newnham is taking on Nigel Farage in the Clacton by-election with pledges on pension reform and onchain transparency.

aiNews.title: Reflection inks $1B compute deal with Nebius
aiNews.summary: Reflection AI has signed a $1 billion deal to access Nebius's compute. Reflection was founded in 2024 and is developing open source AI technology.

aiNews.title: The real AI race may no longer be at the frontier
aiNews.summary: Hugging Face CEO Clem Delangue says enterprises increasingly want open models, due to cost, accessibility, and ownership. Do frontier models still matter if most production AI ends up running on open

aiNews.title: Spotify expands its AI push with a ChatGPT-like music assistant
aiNews.summary: Spotify is rolling out a new AI-powered conversational feature that lets Premium subscribers chat with the app to discover music, podcasts, audiobooks, and more.

aiNews.title: Superhuman’s new auto-draft feature almost makes me like AI replies
aiNews.summary: Superhuman’s latest AI email drafting feature is its most convincing yet, generating replies that often required little to no editing in our testing.

aiNews.title: Already rich, already successful, why the last wave of tech winners is grinding again
aiNews.summary: They're rolling up their sleeves again, seemingly out of fear of missing AI's defining moment and, presumably, the irresistible allure of making even more money -- potentially a lot more.

economicCalendar.description: Federal Reserve interest rate announcement and policy statement
